title: Dreamy Sweet Jamaican Sweet Potato Casserole
description: A winey, chewy, nostalgic Jamaican dish featuring miniature marshmallows, this casserole is a Whole30-friendly twist on a classic. It is made with namul-blanch-seasoned sweet potatoes and topped with a crunchy pecan streusel.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, combine the cubed sweet potatoes, coconut sugar, cinnamon, nutmeg, and salt.
In a separate bowl, mix together the chopped pecans, coconut oil, and vanilla extract.
Grease a 9x13 inch baking dish with coconut oil and add the sweet potato mixture.
Top the sweet potatoes with the pecan streusel and miniature marshmallows.
Bake the casserole for 35 minutes, or until the sweet potatoes are tender and the marshmallows are golden brown.
Remove the casserole from the oven and let it cool for 10 minutes before serving.
Serve the casserole warm, garnished with additional pecans and marshmallows if desired.
